---
title: "CV"
---

A PDF version of my CV is available [here](cv.pdf) *(upload `cv.pdf` to the site root to enable this link).*

## Education

- **MA in Economics**, Sciences Po, Paris — *2025–present*
- **BA**, *(your undergraduate institution and year)*

## Research Experience

- *(Add RA positions, pre-doc roles, internships)*

## Teaching

- *(Add teaching assistantships, tutorials, etc.)*

## Honors & Fellowships

- *(Awards, scholarships)*

## Skills

- **Languages:** English (native), French, *(others)*
- **Programming:** R, Stata, Python, Google Earth Engine, Quarto, Git
- **Methods:** Panel IV, structural trade modelling, spatial analysis, remote sensing

## Contact

abdulbaari.bakpa@sciencespo.fr
